name: Emilia Herrera
description: '''Juana Emilia Herrera García'''{{family name footnote|Herrera|García|lang=Hispanic American}} (1932–1993), known as '''Emilia Herrera''' or '''La Niña Emilia''', was a Colombian [[bullerengue]] singer and songwriter. She released several albums in the 1980s and, alongside her cousin [[Irene Martínez (singer)|Irene Martínez]], played a role in the popularisation of bullerengue as a commercially successful genre in Colombia.
